description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure with a distinctive, voluminous hairstyle that obscures much of the head and face. The individual is dressed in a short-sleeved top with pronounced shoulder pads and a high-waisted, short skirt. The arms are extended slightly outward, and the figure wears thigh-high stockings paired with high-heeled shoes. The overall silhouette is striking, with the hair forming a dramatic, layered mass that extends well beyond the shoulders. The posture is upright and balanced, suggesting a neutral or idle stance.
description: An adult pedestrian with a large, layered hairstyle, short-sleeved top, short skirt, thigh-high stockings, and high-heeled shoes, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the voluminous hairstyle covering the face, the short-sleeved top, skirt, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth and layering of the hairstyle, the profile of the top and skirt, and the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full spread of the layered hairstyle, the back of the outfit, and the alignment of the legs and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the hairstyle's volume and the figure's posture.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved top with shoulder pads and a high-waisted short skirt, thigh-high stockings
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: long, voluminous, layered hair obscuring the face
